policy.description: Default guardian policy — approve unless explicitly denied

rules.name: Deny unsafe exposure
rules.description: Deny public exposure for services tagged as unsafe

rules.name: Quarantine degraded services on exposure
rules.description: Quarantine exposure requests when service health is degraded

rules.name: Deny offline services
rules.description: Deny any request for services that are offline

rules.name: Block untrusted federation peers
rules.description: Deny runtime operations from untrusted federation peers

rules.name: Alert on high-severity threat
rules.description: Log alert when high-severity threat is detected

rules.name: Log all exposure requests
rules.description: Audit-log every exposure request for traceability

rateLimitConfigs.description: Max 10 exposure requests per minute per tool
Max 5 domain binding requests per minute per tool
Max 30 runtime operations per minute per tool
